signature_wines.name: Silberlack Riesling GG
signature_wines.style: still dry Rheingau Riesling Grosses Gewachs
signature_wines.tasting_notes: Schloss Johannisberg's silver-foiled flagship dry Grosses Gewachs from the Johannisberg quartzite slope, with ripe yellow stone fruit, smoky slate and concentrated salty length. Source: schloss-johannisberg.de.
signature_wines.description: The silver-foiled flagship dry Grosses Gewachs from the Johannisberg quartzite slope of the 1720 monastic estate.

signature_wines.name: Goldlack Riesling Trockenbeerenauslese
signature_wines.style: botrytised Rheingau Riesling Trockenbeerenauslese
signature_wines.tasting_notes: The gold-foiled Trockenbeerenauslese in the Schloss Johannisberg colour ladder, in the lineage of the 1775 Spaetlese discovery, with liqueur-like candied stone fruit and saffron over racy slate acidity. Source: schloss-johannisberg.de.
signature_wines.description: The gold-foiled Schloss Johannisberg Trockenbeerenauslese, late-harvest botrytised Riesling in the 1775 Spaetlese lineage.

signature_wines.name: Gruenlack Riesling Spaetlese
signature_wines.style: fruity-sweet Rheingau Riesling Spaetlese
signature_wines.tasting_notes: The green-foiled fruity-style Spaetlese in the Schloss Johannisberg colour ladder, in the lineage of the 1775 Spaetlese discovery, with ripe yellow apple, peach and slate over crisp acidity. Source: schloss-johannisberg.de.
signature_wines.description: Schloss Johannisberg's green-foiled fruity-sweet Spaetlese on the Johannisberg quartzite hill.

signature_wines.name: Steinberger Riesling GG
signature_wines.style: still dry Rheingau Riesling Grosses Gewachs
signature_wines.tasting_notes: The walled-vineyard dry Grosses Gewachs from the 1136 Cistercian Steinberg above Eltville: deep, herbal, smoky Riesling with the structure of a true wall-enclosed cru. Source: kloster-eberbach.de.
signature_wines.description: The walled-vineyard dry Grosses Gewachs from the 1136 Cistercian Steinberg above Eltville.

signature_wines.name: Assmannshaeuser Hoellenberg Spaetburgunder GG
signature_wines.style: still dry Rheingau Spaetburgunder Grosses Gewachs
signature_wines.tasting_notes: The Hessian state estate's dry Grosses Gewachs Pinot Noir from the red phyllite slate of the Hoellenberg, with sour cherry, red plum and fine slaty grip. Source: kloster-eberbach.de.
signature_wines.description: The Hessian state estate's flagship dry Grosses Gewachs Spaetburgunder from the historic German Pinot enclave on red slate.

signature_wines.name: Erbacher Marcobrunn Riesling GG
signature_wines.style: still dry Rheingau Riesling Grosses Gewachs
signature_wines.tasting_notes: The Hessian state estate's dry Grosses Gewachs from the Marcobrunn springwater vineyard on the Erbach bank, dense, broad and mineral. Source: kloster-eberbach.de.
signature_wines.description: The Hessian state estate's dry Grosses Gewachs Riesling from the Marcobrunn springwater vineyard.

signature_wines.name: Schlossberg Riesling GG
signature_wines.style: still dry Rheingau Riesling Grosses Gewachs
signature_wines.tasting_notes: Schloss Vollrads's dry Grosses Gewachs from the steep Schlossberg slope behind the moated Winkel castle, with dense yellow fruit, smoke and slaty length. Source: schlossvollrads.com.
signature_wines.description: Schloss Vollrads's dry Grosses Gewachs from the steep Schlossberg slope behind the moated Winkel castle.

signature_wines.name: Kiedricher Graefenberg Riesling GG
signature_wines.style: still dry Rheingau Riesling Grosses Gewachs
signature_wines.tasting_notes: Robert Weil's flagship dry Grosses Gewachs from the steep Kiedricher Graefenberg phyllite slope, deep, smoky and intensely mineral with decades of cellar life. Source: weingut-robert-weil.com.
signature_wines.description: Robert Weil's flagship dry Grosses Gewachs from the steep Kiedricher Graefenberg phyllite slope.

signature_wines.name: Kiedricher Graefenberg Riesling Auslese
signature_wines.style: botrytised Rheingau Riesling Auslese
signature_wines.tasting_notes: Robert Weil's Graefenberg Auslese: botrytised stone-fruit concentration with honey and smoky slate, balanced by racy Kiedrich acidity. Source: weingut-robert-weil.com.
signature_wines.description: Robert Weil's botrytised Graefenberg Auslese on the steep Kiedrich phyllite slope.

signature_wines.name: Kiedricher Graefenberg Riesling Eiswein
signature_wines.style: Rheingau Riesling Eiswein
signature_wines.tasting_notes: Robert Weil's Eiswein from frozen Riesling berries on the Graefenberg, with candied lemon and frozen peach over razor-sharp acidity. Source: weingut-robert-weil.com.
signature_wines.description: Robert Weil's Graefenberg Eiswein from naturally frozen Riesling berries on the Kiedrich phyllite slope.

signature_wines.name: Hochheimer Hoelle Riesling GG
signature_wines.style: still dry Rheingau Riesling Grosses Gewachs
signature_wines.tasting_notes: Gunter Kuenstler's flagship dry Grosses Gewachs from the Hochheim Hoelle chalky loess slope, dense, smoky and intensely savoury. Source: weingut-kuenstler.de.
signature_wines.description: Kuenstler's flagship dry Grosses Gewachs Riesling from the Hochheim Hoelle chalky loess slope.

signature_wines.name: Ruedesheimer Berg Schlossberg Riesling GG
signature_wines.style: still dry Rheingau Riesling Grosses Gewachs
signature_wines.tasting_notes: Johannes Leitz's estate flagship dry Grosses Gewachs from the steep Berg Schlossberg quartzite slope, smoky, taut and intensely mineral with citrus drive. Source: leitz-wein.de.
signature_wines.description: Leitz's flagship dry Grosses Gewachs Riesling from the Berg Schlossberg quartzite slope above Ruedesheim.

signature_wines.name: Ruedesheimer Berg Schlossberg Riesling
signature_wines.style: still dry Rheingau Riesling single-vineyard
signature_wines.tasting_notes: Theresa Breuer's flagship dry Riesling from the steep Berg Schlossberg quartzite slope, smoky, taut and intensely mineral with decades of cellar life. Source: georg-breuer.com.
signature_wines.description: Theresa Breuer's flagship dry single-vineyard Riesling from the Berg Schlossberg quartzite slope above Ruedesheim.

signature_wines.name: Rauenthaler Nonnenberg Riesling
signature_wines.style: still dry Rheingau Riesling monopole
signature_wines.tasting_notes: Breuer's dry Rauenthaler Nonnenberg monopole Riesling: taut, spicy, savoury Riesling with Taunus phyllite minerality. Source: georg-breuer.com.
signature_wines.description: Breuer's dry Rauenthaler Nonnenberg monopole Riesling on Taunus phyllite.

signature_wines.name: Oestricher Doosberg Riesling GG
signature_wines.style: biodynamic dry Rheingau Riesling Grosses Gewachs
signature_wines.tasting_notes: Peter Jakob Kuhn's biodynamic dry Grosses Gewachs from the Oestricher Doosberg: dense, savoury, salt-driven Riesling under spontaneous fermentation. Source: weingutpjkuehn.de.
signature_wines.description: Peter Jakob Kuhn's biodynamic dry Grosses Gewachs Riesling from the Oestricher Doosberg.

signature_wines.name: Oestricher Lenchen Riesling GG
signature_wines.style: still dry Rheingau Riesling Grosses Gewachs
signature_wines.tasting_notes: The Spreitzer brothers' dry Grosses Gewachs from the Oestricher Lenchen loess and gravel slope: ripe yellow stone fruit and broad mineral palate. Source: weingut-spreitzer.de.
signature_wines.description: Spreitzer's dry Grosses Gewachs Riesling from the Oestricher Lenchen.

signature_wines.name: Lorcher Krone Riesling GG
signature_wines.style: EU-organic dry Rheingau Riesling single-vineyard
signature_wines.tasting_notes: Eva Fricke's flagship dry single-vineyard Riesling from the steep Lorcher Krone grey-slate terraces, cool, taut and racy with intense salty minerality. Source: evafricke.com.
signature_wines.description: Eva Fricke's flagship dry single-vineyard Riesling from the steep Lorcher Krone grey-slate terraces.

signature_wines.name: Wallufer Walkenberg Riesling Spaetlese Trocken
signature_wines.style: old-school dry Rheingau Riesling Spaetlese Trocken
signature_wines.tasting_notes: Hans-Josef Becker's old-school dry Spaetlese Trocken from the Wallufer Walkenberg: dense, savoury, slate-driven Riesling built for decades-long cellar life. Source: jbbecker.de.
signature_wines.description: Becker's old-school dry Wallufer Walkenberg Spaetlese Trocken Riesling.

signature_wines.name: Hochheimer Domdechaney Riesling GG
signature_wines.style: still dry Rheingau Riesling Grosses Gewachs
signature_wines.tasting_notes: Domdechant Werner's dry Grosses Gewachs from the Hochheim Domdechaney chalky loess slope: broad, ripe and mineral with yellow stone fruit and smoke. Source: domdechantwerner.com.
signature_wines.description: Domdechant Werner's dry Grosses Gewachs Riesling from the Hochheimer Domdechaney.

signature_wines.name: Assmannshaeuser Hoellenberg Spaetburgunder GG
signature_wines.style: still dry Rheingau Spaetburgunder Grosses Gewachs
signature_wines.tasting_notes: Weingut Krone's dry Grosses Gewachs Spaetburgunder from the red phyllite slate of the Hoellenberg: pure red cherry, rose petal and savoury herbs with fine slaty grip. Source: weingut-krone.de.
signature_wines.description: Weingut Krone's dry Grosses Gewachs Spaetburgunder from the Assmannshaeuser Hoellenberg.

signature_wines.name: Assmannshaeuser Hoellenberg Spaetburgunder GG
signature_wines.style: still dry Rheingau Spaetburgunder Grosses Gewachs
signature_wines.tasting_notes: August Kesseler's dry Grosses Gewachs Pinot Noir from the red phyllite slate of the Hoellenberg, with dense red cherry, smoky slate and refined tannin. Source: august-kesseler.de.
signature_wines.description: August Kesseler's dry Grosses Gewachs Spaetburgunder from the Hoellenberg red phyllite slate.

signature_wines.name: R Spaetburgunder
signature_wines.style: still dry Rheingau Spaetburgunder reserve
signature_wines.tasting_notes: Kesseler's R reserve Spaetburgunder: dense barrel-aged Pinot Noir with dark cherry, smoky slate and firm tannin built for long cellaring. Source: august-kesseler.de.
signature_wines.description: Kesseler's R reserve Spaetburgunder cuvee, made in top vintages.

signature_wines.name: Assmannshaeuser Hoellenberg Spaetburgunder
signature_wines.style: still dry Rheingau Spaetburgunder whole-cluster
signature_wines.tasting_notes: Chat Sauvage's whole-cluster Hoellenberg Spaetburgunder: dark cherry, smoky red slate and fine tannin from the historic Pinot enclave. Source: chat-sauvage.de.
signature_wines.description: Chat Sauvage's whole-cluster Assmannshaeuser Hoellenberg Spaetburgunder.

signature_wines.name: Hattenheimer Pfaffenberg Riesling GG (Monopole)
signature_wines.style: still dry Rheingau Riesling Grosses Gewachs monopole
signature_wines.tasting_notes: Schloss Schoenborn's dry Grosses Gewachs from the wholly-owned Hattenheimer Pfaffenberg monopole: dense, smoky, savoury Riesling. Source: weingut-schloss-schoenborn.de.
signature_wines.description: Schoenborn's dry Grosses Gewachs Riesling from the Hattenheimer Pfaffenberg monopole.

signature_wines.name: Erbacher Marcobrunn Riesling Erste Lage
signature_wines.style: still dry Rheingau Riesling Erste Lage
signature_wines.tasting_notes: Schloss Reinhartshausen's dry Erbacher Marcobrunn: dense, broad and mineral Riesling from the historic springwater slope on the Erbach bank. Source: schloss-reinhartshausen.de.
signature_wines.description: Schloss Reinhartshausen's dry Erbacher Marcobrunn Riesling.

signature_wines.name: Geheimrat J Riesling Trocken
signature_wines.style: still dry Rheingau Riesling barrel-aged cuvee
signature_wines.tasting_notes: Wegeler's Geheimrat J cuvee dry Riesling, named for Dr Julius Wegeler, barrel-aged and drawn from the top Rheingau holdings. Source: wegeler.com.
signature_wines.description: Wegeler's barrel-aged dry Riesling cuvee Geheimrat J.

signature_wines.name: Sauvage Riesling Brut Sekt
signature_wines.style: traditional-method dry Rheingau Riesling Sekt
signature_wines.tasting_notes: Breuer's bone-dry traditional-method Riesling Sekt: bottle-fermented sparkling with green apple, citrus and toasty lees-autolysis brioche. Source: georg-breuer.com.
signature_wines.description: Breuer's bone-dry traditional-method Riesling Sekt Sauvage.

signature_wines.name: Hochheimer Koenigin Victoriaberg Riesling
signature_wines.style: still dry Rheingau Riesling monopole
signature_wines.tasting_notes: Flick's dry Riesling from the Hochheim Koenigin Victoriaberg monopole: ripe yellow apple and chalky-loess minerality from the slope visited by Queen Victoria in 1850, source of the English term 'hock' for Rhine wine. Source: flick-wein.de.
signature_wines.description: Flick's dry Riesling from the historic Hochheim Koenigin Victoriaberg monopole.

signature_wines.name: Schlehdorn Riesling
signature_wines.style: biodynamic dry Rheingau Riesling reserve
signature_wines.tasting_notes: Kuhn's biodynamic reserve Schlehdorn Riesling cuvee selection: dense, savoury, salt-driven Riesling with spontaneous fermentation and long lees ageing. Source: weingutpjkuehn.de.
signature_wines.description: Kuhn's biodynamic reserve Schlehdorn Riesling from the Oestrich holdings.

signature_wines.name: Rauenthaler Baiken Riesling GG
signature_wines.style: still dry Rheingau Riesling Grosses Gewachs
signature_wines.tasting_notes: The Hessian state estate's dry Grosses Gewachs from the Rauenthaler Baiken Taunus phyllite slope: spicy, taut, savoury Riesling with kerosene-and-citrus drive. Source: kloster-eberbach.de.
signature_wines.description: The Hessian state estate's dry Grosses Gewachs Riesling from the Rauenthaler Baiken.
